summary: After the marathon negotiations between the US and Iran this weekend failed to produce any breakthroughs, the temporary ceasefire appears more precarious than ever.
One of the biggest questions looming over it is Israel, and whether it will accept peace or keep fighting a war on multiple fronts that threatens any chance of a deal.
